scope: Support.laserfiche.com search results reviewed for Laserfiche Error Helper candidates. Include older articles only when the issue plausibly applies to Laserfiche version 9 through version 12.

reviewedResults.title: Modifying Connection And Operation Timeout Limits For the Workflow Designer, Workflow Administration Console, and Workflow Configuration Manager.
reviewedResults.notes: Existing Workflow communication timeout entry.

reviewedResults.title: A "This collection already contains an address with scheme http" Error Occurs When Starting A Workflow In Laserfiche Forms.
reviewedResults.notes: Existing Forms/Workflow multiple IIS bindings entry.

reviewedResults.title: AADSTS75011 when trying to sign into Laserfiche Directory Server with Azure AD SAML SSO
reviewedResults.notes: Existing Directory Server Azure AD SAML entry.

reviewedResults.title: An error occurred while receiving the HTTP response to https://activation.laserfiche.com/IActivationService.svc.
reviewedResults.notes: Existing Activation Tool TLS/proxy entry.

reviewedResults.title: The May 14, 2024 Cumulative Update for .NET Framework May Cause Reliability Issues with the Laserfiche Web Client and Laserfiche WebLink.
reviewedResults.notes: Added Web Client and WebLink HTTP 500 entries. Applies to Web Client 10/11 and WebLink 10/11.

reviewedResults.title: The input is not a valid Base-64 string error when attempting to run a workflow.
reviewedResults.notes: Existing Workflow Designer/Server version mismatch entry.

reviewedResults.title: Rotating the Laserfiche Cloud Public Key Certificate
reviewedResults.notes: Laserfiche Cloud-only article. Current catalog is scoped to listed self-hosted/on-premise products.

reviewedResults.title: A STATUS_BREAKPOINT Error Occurs When Loading a Large Dropdown List in Laserfiche Forms 11 or Laserfiche Web Client 11.
reviewedResults.notes: Existing Forms/Web Client Chromium dropdown entry.

reviewedResults.title: Error loading dialog: Argument cannot be empty Parameter name: SOBOUserName (500 Internal Server Error) when Request Signature with DocuSign
reviewedResults.notes: Added under Connector because the product list does not include a separate DocuSign Integration product. Support search result provides cause and resolution.

reviewedResults.title: Troubleshooting Laserfiche Webtools Agent Connection Errors (Port 18435: Failed)
reviewedResults.notes: Added Webtools Agent diagnostic entry. Support search result exposes troubleshooting topics but not the complete public article body.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for Quick Fields 11 Update 3 Hotfix 1014569
reviewedResults.notes: Added Quick Fields 11 entries for RPC Server unavailable and InvalidCastException Agent failures.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for Quick Fields 9.0 Hotfix 1013389
reviewedResults.notes: Added Quick Fields 9 entries for Object Reference on OCR sample pages and Image is not clean enough to process during Form Extraction.

reviewedResults.title: A "Could not create required control. [6720]" Error Occurs When Signing In With the Laserfiche Windows Client.
reviewedResults.notes: Added Windows Client 10 entry for missing .NET Framework 3.5 prerequisite.

reviewedResults.title: A "Validation of viewstate MAC failed" Error Occurs When Logging In To Web Access 9 After Installing Windows Updates 2894854, 2894855, or 2894856.
reviewedResults.notes: Added Web Client/Web Access 9 entry with upgrade and temporary WebAccessConfig.xml workaround.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for Laserfiche 9.1.1 Service Pack 2.
reviewedResults.notes: Used as corroborating reference for Web Access 9.1.1 SP2; not separately curated because the specific ViewState error is covered by KB 1013541.

reviewedResults.title: An "Importing the document failed because there was an error assigning template or field data for template 'TemplateName'." Error Occurs When Printing To Laserfiche Snapshot 9.1.1.
reviewedResults.notes: Added Snapshot 9 template/read-only field import failure with workaround and SP2 fix.

reviewedResults.title: Laserfiche Snapshot 9 May Not Properly Use the Selected OCR Language Option When Viewing Snapshot Configuration With A Language Pack.
reviewedResults.notes: Useful Snapshot configuration guidance, but no explicit error message or error code.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for Laserfiche Windows and Web Clients 10.4.2 Update 3
reviewedResults.notes: Added Web Client DocuSign object-reference page generation error and Windows Client/LFDS unexpected response for many domain groups.

reviewedResults.title: Release Notes for Import Agent 11
reviewedResults.notes: Added Import Agent 11 XML/PDF extracted text conflict and GCount existing-folder collision entries. Reviewed but did not add generic Event Viewer/profile migration issue because the public text did not expose the actual error message.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for Import Agent 11 Update 1
reviewedResults.notes: Mentions improved permissions/auth-key troubleshooting and clearer messages, but does not provide a stable error message to catalog.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for Import Agent 11
reviewedResults.notes: Mostly fixes and quality-of-life changes without stable error messages; the clearer Import Agent known issues came from KB 1014464.

reviewedResults.title: Release Notes for Laserfiche API Server
reviewedResults.notes: Added API Server request entity too large document import issue with IIS uploadReadAheadSize workaround.

reviewedResults.title: List of Changes for the Laserfiche 11 February 2023 Update.
reviewedResults.notes: Added focused Web Client 11 PDF page-generation errors. Other release-note items were reviewed but left out when they lacked a stable troubleshooting message or overlapped existing entries.

reviewedResults.title: Software versions and fixes included in the Laserfiche 11 Download Package
reviewedResults.notes: Added Laserfiche Installer mounted-ISO disk error workaround. Other package-rollup content was not curated directly.

reviewedResults.title: Users may receive Error - AADSTS75011 when trying to authenticate using Entra ID
reviewedResults.notes: Search result overlaps existing AADSTS75011 Directory Server entry; infrapi lookup did not return article body.

reviewedResults.title: A "Failed to initialize metadata display. Could not create required control. [6720]" Error Occurs When Opening A Document on After Applying Laserfiche 8.3.0 Service Pack 2.
reviewedResults.notes: Pre-version-9 article. Not included under the version 9-12 rule.

reviewedResults.title: A "Failed to initialize metadata display. Unknown error. [340]" Error Occurs When Opening a Document or Viewing Metadata.
reviewedResults.notes: Legacy article predates version 9; not included without version 9-12 applicability evidence.

reviewedResults.title: An "Unknown error. [6000]" Error Can Occur When Using Laserfiche In A Citrix Environment.
reviewedResults.notes: Legacy Citrix article predates version 9; not included without version 9-12 applicability evidence.

reviewedResults.title: Release Notes for WebLink 11
reviewedResults.notes: Contains known issues, but most are compatibility prompts or UI behavior rather than actionable error troubleshooting entries.

reviewedResults.title: Release Notes for WebLink 10
reviewedResults.notes: Contains known issues, but most overlap WebLink 11 release-note limitations or are not error-fix troubleshooting entries.

reviewedResults.title: A [7039:0] Error Occurs in Web Access and Users May Not Be Able to Log In to Laserfiche
reviewedResults.notes: Article targets Laserfiche 6/7 Pervasive.SQL. Not plausibly version 9-12 without stronger evidence.

searchesReviewed.query: "Installer may report an error finding a disk"
